name: Autocomplete
playroomSnippet:
<Autocomplete
          label="Search fruits"
          getSuggestions={(value) => {
            const fruits = ['apple', 'banana', 'coconut']
            return fruits.filter(fruit => fruit.startsWith(value));
          }}
          value={getState('autocomplete') ?? ''}
          onChangeValue={setState('autocomplete')}
        />
